name: rlog-js
description: Console-compatible TypeScript logging and stream capture for Node.js CLI tools and automation.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test test/compatibility.test.js test/targets.test.js test/rotation-text.test.js test/rotation-jsonl.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && node --test --experimental-test-coverage test/compatibility.test.js test/targets.test.js test/rotation-text.test.js test/rotation-jsonl.test.js

author: RavelloH
